Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add editable email with pending verification flow

Users can now request an email change from the account page. The new
address receives a 7-day confirmation link before becoming active; the
old address remains in use until confirmed. Expired pending changes are
cleared by the cron job.

- prisma: add pendingEmail/pendingEmailToken/pendingEmailExpiresAt to User
- mailer: add sendEmailChangeVerification \(DE + EN\)
- api/user/email: PATCH to initiate change, DELETE to cancel
- api/user/verify-email-change: GET handler swaps email on valid token
- cron/cleanup: clear expired pending email changes
- EmailEditor: client component with pending banner and cancel support
- account page: show emailChange status banners, render EmailEditor
- i18n: add Account.emailChange keys \(de + en\)
EOF
\)")
Bash(gh auth login --hostname github.com --git-protocol https --web 2>&1 || true)
Bash(gh repo create MichaelBiermann/wsc81 --private --description "Homepage for Walldorfer Ski-Club 81 e.V." 2>&1)
Bash(git remote add origin https://github.com/MichaelBiermann/wsc81.git && git push -u origin main 2>&1)
Bash(gh auth setup-git --hostname github.com 2>&1 && git push -u origin main 2>&1)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add full project codebase

Complete implementation of the WSC 81 homepage including:
- Next.js App Router scaffold with next-intl \(de/en\), Tailwind, Prisma
- Public pages: homepage, events, booking, membership, search, sponsors, static pages
- Auth: NextAuth with admin and user credentials providers
- Admin area: events, sponsors, members, newsletter, content editor, settings
- User accounts: registration, email verification, account page, profile editing
- Email change with pending verification flow
- PostgreSQL full-text search \(tsvector triggers\)
- Nodemailer/SendGrid email delivery
- Vercel cron job for cleanup of expired tokens
EOF
\)")

Bash(DATABASE_URL="postgresql://neondb_owner:npg_1crNTFaGK9lg@ep-young-heart-aldgxjds-pooler.c-3.eu-central-1.aws.neon.tech/neondb?sslmode=require&channel_binding=require" node -e "
const { PrismaPg } = require\('@prisma/adapter-pg'\);
const { PrismaClient } = require\('@prisma/client'\);

const adapter = new PrismaPg\({ connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL }\);
const prisma = new PrismaClient\({ adapter }\);

async function main\(\) {
  const event = await prisma.event.create\({
    data: {
      titleDe: 'Saisoneröffnung in Kühtai',
      titleEn: 'Season Opening in Kühtai',
      descriptionDe: \\`Wir fahren wieder nach Kühtai! Nach dem gelungenen ersten Mal im vergangenen Jahr kehren wir zum Gasthof „Schöne Aussicht" am 2.020 m hohen Kühtaier Pass zurück.

Unterkunft: Gasthof „Schöne Aussicht", Kühtai
• Sonnenterrasse, Sauna, Infrarotkabine, Sportgeschäft
• 5 Nächte mit Halbpension
• 4-Tages-Skipass Kühtai/Hochötz
• Kurtaxe und Insolvenzversicherung inklusive

Preise pro Person:
• WSC-Mitglieder Doppelzimmer: € 499,50
• WSC-Mitglieder Einzelzimmer: € 681,00
• Nichtmitglieder-Aufpreis \(ab 18 Jahre\): € 40,00

Mindestteilnehmerzahl: 8 Personen | Mindestalter: 16 Jahre
Anmeldung und Kontakt: Oliver Steinbach, info@s.oliverlimousinen-service.de, Tel. 0172/675 1143\\`,
      descriptionEn: \\`We are heading back to Kühtai! Following last year's successful inaugural trip, we return to Gasthof "Schöne Aussicht" at the 2,020-metre Kühtai pass in Austria.

Accommodation: Gasthof "Schöne Aussicht", Kühtai
• Sun terrace, sauna, infrared cabin, sports shop
• 5 nights with half-board
• 4-day ski pass Kühtai/Hochötz
• Resort tax and insolvency insurance included

Prices per person:
• WSC members double room: €499.50
• WSC members single room: €681.00
• Non-member surcharge \(18+\): €40.00

Minimum participants: 8 | Minimum age: 16
Registration & contact: Oliver Steinbach, info@s.oliverlimousinen-service.de, Tel. 0172/675 1143\\`,
      location: 'Gasthof Schöne Aussicht, Kühtai, Österreich',
      startDate: new Date\('2025-12-16T00:00:00.000Z'\),
      endDate: new Date\('2025-12-21T00:00:00.000Z'\),
      depositAmount: 499.50,
      totalAmount: 499.50,
      maxParticipants: null,
      registrationDeadline: new Date\('2025-10-30T00:00:00.000Z'\),
    },
  }\);
  console.log\('Created event:', event.id, event.titleDe\);
  await prisma.\\$disconnect\(\);
}
main\(\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e\); process.exit\(1\); }\);
" 2>&1 | grep -v "SECURITY WARNING\\|ssl modes\\|next major\\|prepare for\\|sslmode=verify\\|uselibpqcompat\\|libpq-ssl\\|node --trace")
